messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: BL-380 channel provisioning latches the dead pre-migration group id and never follows the group-to-supergroup migration
How it works: Detection selects the migrated supergroup id, not the pre-migration group id

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-444 - BL-380 channel provisioning latches the dead pre-migration group id and never follows the group-to-supergroup migration is complete.
